mapper.sql: s.id, s.name, s.singer_id, s.category_id, s.pinyin, s.pinyin_initial, s.language, s.duration, s.file_path, s.cover_url, s.lyric_path, s.play_count, s.is_hot, s.is_new, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time, sg.name as singer_name, c.name as category_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_song s LEFT JOIN t_singer sg ON s.singer_id = sg.id AND sg.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_category c ON s.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM t_song s LEFT JOIN t_singer sg ON s.singer_id = sg.id AND sg.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_category c ON s.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.status = 1 AND ( s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.pinyin_initial LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{keyword}), '%') OR s.pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.play_count DESC, s.id DESC

SELECT
FROM t_song s LEFT JOIN t_singer sg ON s.singer_id = sg.id AND sg.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_category c ON s.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.status = 1 AND s.singer_id = #{singerId} ORDER BY s.name ASC

SELECT
FROM t_song s LEFT JOIN t_singer sg ON s.singer_id = sg.id AND sg.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_category c ON s.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.status = 1 AND s.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY s.name ASC
